# DEPRECATED fixture set — do NOT use

This fixture version is **old and no longer used**. The current set is **v3**
(`tests/fixtures/FIXTURES_VERSION` = `v3`). Use `tests/fixtures/transcripts/v3/` and
`tests/fixtures/audio/v3/` instead — v3 carries per-episode ground-truth sidecars
(`<name>.groundtruth.json`) for the speaker / diarization eval. See
`tests/fixtures/transcripts/v3/README.md`.
